faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Lake Success home?
faqs.answer: Signs include small holes in wool clothing or upholstery, silky tubes or casings in closets or drawers, small beige moths flying near wardrobes, and larvae (small white caterpillars) on fabrics. You may also notice webbing in corners of closets or damage to natural fiber rugs, especially in less-disturbed storage areas common in Lake Success's larger homes.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Lake Success?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Lake Success typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of affected areas. Larger estates with multiple closets, storage rooms, or extensive fabric furnishings may require more comprehensive treatment. We provide detailed inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are your clothes moth treatments safe for my fine fabrics and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, fabric-safe treatments specifically designed for clothes moth control that won't damage your valuable clothing, upholstery, or rugs. Our methods are safe for homes with children and pets when applied according to professional standards, and we always explain any necessary precautions during treatment of your Lake Success property.
